key_insight: PolicyGuard turns organizational policies into an executable neuro-symbolic review engine, making compliance checks explicit instead of burying them inside prompt-only LLM reasoning.
engineering_relevance: This design is useful for audit-friendly document automation because policy logic can be updated, tested, and inspected separately from the language model.
method: Convert policy guidance into typed relational logic rules and atom-level extraction questions.
Use LLMs to answer local questions from retrieved document evidence.
Apply a symbolic evaluator to the extracted facts to flag non-compliance.
evidence_signal: The abstract reports an instantiation and evaluation on company-specific NDA compliance review, where contract clauses are checked against organization-specific negotiation policies.
watch_item: Performance may depend on the quality of policy formalization, retrieval, and question design, so errors in any of these layers could affect compliance decisions.
paper_title: PolicyGuard: From Organizational Policies to Neuro-SymbolicCompliance Review Engines
